panels.description: Count of healthy Lotus Core services currently being scraped by Prometheus.
panels.title: Healthy Services

panels.description: Current aggregate API throughput across active HTTP services.
panels.title: API Request Rate

panels.description: Durable events waiting to be published. Persistent elevation indicates transport lag or downstream pressure.
panels.title: Pending Outbox

panels.description: Age of the oldest still-pending outbox event.
panels.title: Oldest Outbox Age

panels.description: Current number of portfolio/security keys actively under replay or reset-watermark processing.
panels.title: Active Reprocessing Keys

panels.description: Age of the oldest unprocessed ingestion backlog item.
panels.title: Ingestion Backlog Age

panels.description: Terminally failed outbox rows stored in the database. Any non-zero value means manual investigation is required.
panels.title: Durable Outbox Failures

panels.description: Rate of replay or scheduler updates skipped by epoch fencing. Sustained elevation means stale work is still reaching active paths.
panels.title: Replay Stale Skip Rate

panels.description: Rate of valuation jobs reaching terminal failure. Any persistent value above zero is abnormal for steady-state operation.
panels.title: Valuation Failure Rate

panels.description: Rate of reconciliation runs ending in a blocking state. Sustained non-zero values indicate control-plane intervention is required.
panels.title: Blocking Reconciliation Outcomes

panels.description: Service-level API throughput. Use with availability to spot silent traffic drops or overload concentration.
panels.title: HTTP Request Rate by Service

panels.description: Binary health of each scraped service. Any value below 1 indicates an unhealthy or unreachable instance.
panels.title: Service Availability by Job

panels.description: Repository-level average latency for database operations. Use to spot hot methods and inefficient query paths.

targets.expr: sum by (repository, method) (rate(db_operation_latency_seconds_sum[5m])) / sum by (repository, method) (rate(db_operation_latency_seconds_count[5m]))

panels.title: Average DB Operation Latency

panels.description: Observed replay outcomes split by recovery path and status.
panels.title: Replay Audit Outcomes

panels.description: Replay duplicates, stale-skip pressure, and failure signals. Persistent elevation indicates replay turbulence rather than healthy throughput.
panels.title: Replay Pressure

panels.description: Durable event backlog, publish rate, retry pressure, and terminal failure accumulation.
panels.title: Outbox Backlog and Publish Pressure

panels.description: Replay work-in-flight, backlog aging, and worker claim/completion/failure balance.
panels.title: Reprocessing Worker Throughput and Backlog

panels.description: Valuation scheduler creation/failure rates and worker claim/reset activity.
panels.title: Valuation Scheduling and Worker Health

panels.description: Publication distribution across durable transport topics. Useful for spotting suppressed or starving workflow stages.
panels.title: Outbox Publication by Topic

panels.description: Financial reconciliation throughput and finding severity pressure.
panels.title: Reconciliation Outcomes and Findings

panels.description: Analytics export job outcomes by dataset type.
panels.title: Analytics Export Outcomes

panels.description: p95 export latency, payload size, and page depth by dataset type.
panels.title: Analytics Export Latency and Payload Depth

title: Lotus Core Operational Overview
description: Operational dashboard for Lotus Core. Organized around platform health, replay recovery, durable event flow, valuation/timeseries processing, and reconciliation/export observability.
